headline: FOXA Q1 Deep Dive: Advertising Resilience, Digital Growth, and Sports Rights Drive Momentum
summary: Cable news and media network Fox (NASDAQ:FOXA) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, but sales fell by 8.6% year on year to $3.99 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.32 per share was 36.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Assessing Fox (FOXA) Valuation After Recent Share Price Moves And Undervalued Narrative
summary: Fox stock overview after recent performance Fox (FOXA) has been on many investors’ watchlists after recent price moves, including a decline of 1.7% over the past day and gains over the past week, month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Fox. At a share price of US$65.32, Fox has recently eased back over the year to date, even after a 15.9% 3 month share price return and a 118.2% 3 year total shareholder return. This points to shifting sentiment rather than a simple one way...

headline: Ad Tech Touted During Warner Bros. Discovery's Likely Final Upfront Presentation
summary: Paramount Skydance outbid Netflix for all of Warner Bros. Discovery's assets, including the cable networks and the ad-supported version of HBO Max. Read more here.
